revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-190

A relay having two windings so connected that when these windings are energized simultaneously their magnetic effects neutralize each other.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}
